title: Cross-asset pipeline portability smoke run (XAG/EUR/BTC D1)
source: 2026-05-26 conversation "abrir los tests a FX + metales + crypto". User pivot from B0016a hygiene track to portability hygiene track.
why: Pipeline has been developed against XAU for Phase 1 + Phase 5. Silent XAU-specific coupling almost certainly accumulated (paths, defaults, column assumptions, regime params). Discovering portability bugs NOW on cheap D1 runs is much better than discovering them in Paso 2 H4 where they compound with methodology work. **Honest framing: regression/portability testing, NOT cross-asset edge validation** — barriers are XAU-tuned and not transferable per the 2026-05-25 finding (Sharpe -0.32 → +5.18 from one barrier swap on the SAME asset).
value_rationale: M (regression/hygiene; not alpha). Hackathon-demo value of "pipeline portable across FX/metals/crypto" is real but secondary to the bug-catching purpose.
